onboarding.stationReady: Your station is ready for agents.

welcome.title: Welcome to Mission Control
welcome.description: Your station for AI agents. When agents dock here, they gain persistent memory, task management, coordinated workflows, and full observability. We've scanned your setup — here's what's online.
welcome.monitorClaude: Monitor Claude Code sessions on this machine
welcome.activeSessionsDetected: {count} active session{count, plural, one {} other {s}} detected
welcome.installAtLeastOne: Install at least one to get started.

interfaceMode.title: Choose Your Station Layout
interfaceMode.description: Essential shows the core panels operators need most. Full unlocks every system on the station — memory, automation, security auditing, and more. You can switch anytime.
interfaceMode.essentialDescription: Streamlined ops — the panels you'll use daily: fleet overview, agents, tasks, chat, activity feed, logs, and settings.
interfaceMode.fullDescription: Full station access — adds memory browser, cron scheduling, webhooks, alerts, security audit, cost tracking, and gateway config.

gatewayLink.title: Gateway Link
gatewayLink.description: Mission Control registers its origin with the gateway so it can connect via WebSocket and manage agents remotely.
gatewayLink.originAdded: Mission Control origin added to gateway allowedOrigins
gatewayLink.registrationPending: Registration pending — will be configured on next capabilities check
gatewayLink.deviceAuthDisabled: Device auth disabled — MC authenticates via gateway token
gatewayLink.deviceAuthWillConfigure: Will be configured alongside origin registration

credentials.title: Secure Your Station
credentials.description: The admin password protects your station console. The API key is a docking credential — agents present it when they register, so only authorized agents can dock.
credentials.passwordWeak: Using a default or weak password — change AUTH_PASS in .env
credentials.apiKeyConfigured: Configured — agents can dock using this key
credentials.apiKeyNotSet: Not set — agents won't be able to dock without a configured key. Run: bash scripts/generate-env.sh --force
credentials.securityScanDescription: Verify network, runtime, and OpenClaw hardening before you launch the station.

channels.title: Channels
channels.noChannelsConfigured: No channels configured yet. Configure messaging platforms (WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, Slack, etc.) in your gateway settings.
channels.gatewayUnreachable: Cannot reach the gateway. Check that it is running and accessible.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.removeDescription: This will remove {target} from the .env file. The gateway must be restarted for changes to take effect.

execApproval.previewMatches: Preview: {count, plural, one {# recent command} other {# recent commands}} would match

superAdmin.accessDeniedDesc: Super Mission Control requires admin privileges.
superAdmin.title: Super Mission Control
superAdmin.subtitleLocal: Local control plane view over scheduler automations and runtime state.

superAdmin.liveExecutionDesc: Will stop services and apply teardown changes after approval + run.
superAdmin.removeStateDirsDesc: Deletes `.openclaw` and `workspace` paths when user is kept.

superAdmin.slugAndNameRequired: Slug and display name are required
